visual_features.overall_style: Modern, minimal, flat design with a muted, earthy color palette (dark brown + teal/green). Strong, bold typography gives it a slightly industrial/tech feel. Very little decoration; relies on blocks of color, large type, and clear structure.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is driven primarily by size, weight, and contrast. 1) The name “JON GUNTER” is the largest, boldest element in white on a dark brown band. 2) The role subtitle sits just below in smaller uppercase, lighter weight but high contrast. 3) The navigation bar is a full-width dark green strip with uppercase links. 4) The CONTACT page title inside the white content card is large, bold, uppercase. 5) Contact method labels (EMAIL, LINKEDIN, GITHUB) are bold uppercase next to icons; their corresponding addresses/URLs are smaller, regular weight. Icons (GitHub/LinkedIn in header and each contact icon) also act as focal points through strong contrast.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Generous margins around the central white card and ample vertical padding inside it. Each contact row has comfortable spacing between icon, label, and supporting text. Sections are separated by clear blocks of background color, creating strong visual breathing room despite a relatively simple layout.
unique_elements: Stacked, full-width color bands (dark brown header, dark green nav, teal background) creating clear horizontal segmentation.
Large centered white content card floating on a teal background, giving a framed, letter-like look.
Bold, condensed uppercase typography for name, section titles, and labels, establishing a strong personal brand.
Social icons (GitHub, LinkedIn) rendered in the accent teal against the dark header for a minimal, clean icon-only treatment.

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Implicit single-column center layout likely mapped onto a simple 12-column grid with the main content card using roughly 8–10 columns and centered.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Full-width stacked bands (header, navigation, background) with a centered, fixed-width content card. No sidebars; primary content is vertically stacked.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: Top header band with name, subtitle, and social icons; below it a full-width horizontal navigation bar; the main page content appears as a centered white card on a teal background, with the CONTACT heading at the top followed by a vertical list of contact methods.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Left-aligned text for all core content. Header text (name and subtitle) is left-aligned within the header band; navigation links are left aligned within the nav bar. Icons in the header are right aligned. Inside the content card, everything follows a strong left alignment (heading, rule, icons, labels, descriptions).
responsive_hints: Full-width color bands suggest easy scaling across viewport sizes.
Central white card with large left/right margins indicates a max-width container that would scale down gracefully on smaller screens.
Typography and content blocks are simple and linear, suggesting a mobile-friendly stack where nav could collapse into a stacked list or hamburger menu.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow. First: a full-width dark header containing logo text (name/role) on the left and two small social icons on the right. Second: a full-width navigation bar with horizontal text links. Third: a teal background filling the viewport, with a large white, left-aligned card centered horizontally. Inside the card: a large CONTACT heading, a horizontal divider line, followed by a vertical list of contact rows. Each row is a two-part horizontal flex-like layout: a black square icon on the left and a text block on the right (uppercase label + smaller address/URL).
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: Header and nav consume the top 20–25% of vertical space with modest padding. The remaining area is dominated by the white content card, which sits centered with generous teal margins on left and right (approx. 15–20% of viewport width as side margins). Within the card, the top heading and rule occupy a small portion, while the majority of the card height is reserved for the contact list, which includes generous vertical spacing between items.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Spacious layout with plenty of whitespace. Information density is low–moderate: each contact method gets its own row with large icons and ample padding, making it easy to scan but not content-dense. The design prioritizes clarity and readability over packing content.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: Strong vertical flow. The eye starts at the large name in the dark header, then moves slightly down to the subtitle, across to the social icons on the right, then down to the navigation links (HOME, CONTACT). From there, the eye drops into the central white card, first catching the large CONTACT title, then follows the horizontal rule, then scans down the list of contact rows, left-to-right within each row (icon → label → supporting text).

ui_patterns.visual_description: Primary interactive elements visible are text links (HOME, CONTACT) styled as uppercase, bold or semi-bold sans-serif with no box, likely with a color change or underline on hover. Potential future buttons would naturally follow this aesthetic: rectangular shapes with sharp or very small-radius corners (2–4px), flat color fills in the primary green/teal, white text, and no heavy shadows. Padding would be moderate (e.g., 10–12px vertical, 20–24px horizontal) to match the generous layout.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Typically implemented as <a> elements styled as buttons for navigation and external links (e.g., GitHub, LinkedIn). For form submissions or CTAs, <button type="button|submit"> elements with text (and optionally an inline SVG icon) inside, wrapped directly without extra nested divs unless needed for layout.

ui_patterns.visual_description: The main content area behaves like a large card: pure white background (#FFFFFF), sharp 0–2px corner radius, no visible drop shadow (or a very subtle one, if any), and a clear visual separation from the teal background via contrast alone. Inside the card, padding is generous (around 32–48px on all sides). Internal dividers use a thin, solid line in the dark green to separate header (CONTACT title) from content.

ui_patterns.visual_description: No explicit form is visible in the screenshot, but based on the visual language, form elements would likely be clean and flat: full-width white input fields with 1px solid borders in a neutral gray or the dark green, sharp corners (2–4px radius), and moderate vertical padding (8–10px). Labels would be uppercase or small caps, left-aligned above each field for clarity, with adequate spacing (4–8px) between label and input. Validation messaging would most likely use small text beneath fields with color-coded text (error red, success green) and possibly border color changes.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Stacked form layout: <form> containing groups like <div class="form-group"> with a <label for="id"> above an <input> or <textarea>. Inputs are full-width within the card’s content area. Validation states managed via modifier classes (e.g., .is-error, .is-success) applied to the form-group or input.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Horizontal primary navigation bar with a solid dark green background (#33594B). Nav items (HOME, CONTACT) are uppercase, white text, evenly spaced horizontally, with ample left padding from the viewport edge. There’s no visible border between items. The active page (likely CONTACT) may be indicated by a slightly different shade, underline, or boldness. Overall character: simple, flat, and minimal with focus on typography.

ui_patterns.visual_description: The contact section itself is a vertical list of media-object style items: each row features a prominent black square icon on the left and a text block on the right. The text block includes a bold uppercase label (e.g., EMAIL) and a smaller, regular-weight line below with the actual address/URL. Spacing between rows is generous (approx. 24–32px). No explicit separators (lines) between items; separation is created by whitespace. Icons are high-contrast (white symbol on black square), providing strong visual anchors.

heading.visual_style: Bold, condensed sans-serif with uppercase styling, strong vertical strokes, and tight letter-spacing. It feels industrial/tech and highly legible at large sizes.

body.visual_style: Clean, neutral humanist/grotesque sans-serif suitable for simple content blocks and good on-screen readability.

spacing_system.component_padding: Primary components (header bands, nav bar, and content card) use padding in multiples of the base unit: e.g., 16–24px vertically and 24–32px horizontally inside the card; header and nav likely around 16px vertical padding.
spacing_system.section_margin: Major sections (header → nav → main card) are separated by direct color bands rather than large gaps, but the main card is inset from the viewport by large outer margins (approximately 32–64px top/bottom and 10–15% of viewport width on sides). Inside the card, vertical spacing between stacked elements (heading, rule, list items) is around 16–32px.

interaction_hints: Navigation links likely change color or underline on hover (e.g., from white to a lighter teal or underlined) while maintaining the flat aesthetic.
Social icons in the header may use a hover effect such as slight color lightening, opacity change, or a subtle scale-up transition (transform: scale(1.05)).
Contact rows could use a soft hover highlight (e.g., light background tint or subtle left border in the accent teal) to indicate interactivity when the icon/label is clickable.
Transitions should be simple and fast (150–250ms) using ease-out or ease-in-out, keeping with the minimal, professional feel and avoiding flashy animations.
